test_completeness.justification: BUG fix in the terminal resize hook (follow-up to PR #146). Every wiring/timing behavior is unit-tested; the sole untestable row is the actual broken-box clearing in Claude's live TUI on a real GPU (requires-physical-device).

behaviors.behavior: dims-changing ResizeObserver resize -> staggered trailing term.refresh(0,rows-1)
behaviors.evidence: unit useTerminalResize.test.ts 'a dims-changing resize schedules trailing full-viewport repaints' PASSED; E2E 92 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: dedupe no-op resize (unchanged dims) -> NO trailing repaint
behaviors.evidence: unit 'no trailing repaint when the resize is a dedupe no-op' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: focus with dims change -> synchronous repaint + trailing repaints
behaviors.evidence: unit 'focus with a dims change adds trailing repaints on top of the synchronous one' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: pending trailing repaints cancelled on unmount
behaviors.evidence: unit 'pending trailing repaints are cancelled on unmount' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: trailing timer firing after disposal -> no-op (no refresh on dead term)
behaviors.evidence: unit 'a trailing repaint that fires after disposal is a no-op' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: actual broken-box clearing in Claude's real TUI on a real GPU/monitor reflow
behaviors.evidence: needs Claude's live alt-buffer TUI + GPU + monitor reflow; not reproducible headless; real-device smoke = user

enumeration_basis.basis: one row per code path introduced (3 send paths schedule, dedupe-skip, unmount-cancel, disposed-guard) + 1 device-only visual outcome

surface_verification.runner: BASE_URL=http://localhost:5273 playwright test e2e/flows/92-terminal-reflow-repaint.spec.ts --project=chromium (isolated stack: temp USERPROFILE, loopback, no Claude spawn)
